context_pack_id.description: Reference to the context pack that guided this task.

product_contract_refs.description: Product contract documents referenced for this task.

architecture_refs.description: Architecture boundary documents referenced for this task.

decision_refs.description: Decision records (ADRs) referenced for this task.

test_matrix_refs.description: Test matrix entries referenced for this task.

stale_ground_checked.description: Whether stale ground (outdated context) has been checked before claiming completion.

unresolved_context_questions.description: Open context questions that were identified but not resolved.

context_delta.description: Summary of changes to context artifacts during this task (e.g., contract updated, boundary changed).

ref.description: Reference to the context artifact or evidence file.

kind.description: Kind of context evidence (e.g., contract_oracle, staleness_check, decision_record).
